metadata.description: Feinschmiede — fine-grained, branded media plugins for Claude Code, coupled by CLI capabilities (never file paths). Phase-0 scratch marketplace: feinklang (audio) plus a throwaway cross-plugin smoke test.

plugins.name: feinklang
plugins.description: Audio voiceover — ElevenLabs text-to-speech via the clean `feinklang` CLI.

plugins.name: feinklang-consumer
plugins.description: Throwaway Phase-0 smoke test: depends on feinklang and calls it as a bare command. Not for distribution.
